=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
November 17 1993
The Supper Club New York, NY  (Early Show+Late Show)

lineage unknown received in trade 

cd-r>EAC (secure mode)>TLH> flac (Level-8)>md-5>torrent



Early show
Ragged And Dirty  
One More Cup Of Coffee  
Blood In My Eyes  
Queen Jane Approximately  
I'll Be Your Baby Tonight  
Disease Of Conceit  
I Want You  
Ring Them Bells  
My Back Pages  
Forever Young 

Late show
Ragged And Dirty  
Lay Lady Lay  
Tight Connection To My Heart  
Weeping Willow  
Delia  
Jim Jones  
Queen Jane Approximately  
Ring Them Bells  
Jack-A-Roe  
Forever Young  
I Shall Be Released
